name: LI-RADS (Liver Imaging Reporting and Data System)
description: LI-RADS classification template for hepatocellular carcinoma surveillance in high-risk patients

rads.recommendation: Consider biopsy or alternative imaging for confirmation

findings.technique: Multiparametric MRI of the liver performed with axial T1, T2, DWI, and contrast-enhanced sequences including arterial, portal venous, and delayed phases.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior CT/MRI] from [date]. [New/Interval change] findings described.

sections.name: Arterial Phase
sections.content: Lesion in [segment] demonstrates [marked / mild / non-massive] arterial phase hyperenhancement measuring [X]cm.

sections.name: Portal Venous Phase
sections.content: Lesion demonstrates [low / moderate / high] signal on portal venous phase [with / without] washout appearance.

sections.name: Delayed Phase
sections.content: Lesion demonstrates [capsule appearance / peripheral enhancement / no definite enhancement] on delayed phase.

sections.name: DWI
sections.content: Lesion demonstrates [restricted diffusion / no restricted diffusion] on DWI sequences.

sections.name: 辅助特征
sections.content: Additional features: [ Tumor in vein / arterial hyperenhancement not in tumor / LR-M appearance ] [Present/Absent].

impression:
1. LI-RADS LR-[X]: [category description]
2. Lesion in [segment] measuring [X]cm
3. [Follow-up recommended / Biopsy recommended / No definite features of HCC]
4. Underlying cirrhosis with [portal hypertension / no portal hypertension]
author: RadReport Templates
